subcodes.first_line: Darkness hath indeed encompassed every region, and that which was inscribed in the Books of God, the Almighty, the Powerful, the Chosen One, hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذت الظلمه کل الاشطار و ظهر ما کان مسطورا فی کتب الله المقتدر العزیز المختار
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @thankfulness; gratitude
